question.text: Under the SEBI (PIT) Regulations, which of the following designated persons are covered by the Code of Conduct irrespective of their functional role?

answer.text: CEO and employees up to two levels below CEO
Only those with access to UPSI

explanation.text: **The Logic:** As per Regulation 9(4)(iv), the CEO and employees up to two levels below CEO of listed company, intermediary, fiduciary and material subsidiaries are covered irrespective of their functional role or ability to access UPSI. **The Trap:** While most designated persons are identified based on functional role and access to UPSI, the top two levels below CEO are automatically included. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** IT staff and secretarial staff with UPSI access are also specifically covered under clause (v).
